appliedUpdates.description: Documented runtime blocker details for missing NEXT_PUBLIC InsForge env vars and auth-form failure mode on /login when .env.local is absent.
Removed VAL-CROSS-006 from this milestone validation scope and deferred it to the video-studio feature per orchestrator override.
